subtitles.original: みんな、千速生誕祭2026にお越しいただきありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for coming to Chihaya Birthday Festival 2026!

subtitles.original: 盛り上がる準備できてっか？
subtitles.english: Are you ready to get hyped?

subtitles.original: ブチ上げていくぞ！
subtitles.english: Let's pump it up!

subtitles.original: でも ちょっと今から急いでライブ会場にみんなを連れて行かなきゃなんないから
subtitles.english: But I have to rush to take everyone to the live venue right now,

subtitles.original: 一緒に行ってくれるか？
subtitles.english: so will you come with me?

subtitles.original: 行くぞ！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: 熱くなった銀のメタリックハート
subtitles.english: This metallic heart of silver grew hotter

subtitles.original: 導火線に火をつけてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll light the fuse for you

subtitles.original: 不思議なほどハイな気分さ
subtitles.english: This is such a wondrous high

subtitles.original: 砂埃を巻き上げて行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go kick up some dust

subtitles.original: 悲鳴をまじらせ暴走する鼓動
subtitles.english: A wild pulse coupled with the shouts

subtitles.original: 目の前にはミサイルの雨
subtitles.english: Before my eyes a rain of missiles

subtitles.original: アドレナリンずっと流して
subtitles.english: Adrenaline always pumping

subtitles.original: 僕の方がオーバーヒートしそう
subtitles.english: It'll be me that overheats!

subtitles.original: 爆発して灰になっても
subtitles.english: Even if I explode and turn into ash

subtitles.original: このままだと笑ってるね きっと
subtitles.english: I bet I'll be laughing as I am now

subtitles.original: 街を追い越して この世の果てまで
subtitles.english: Throughout the city to the ends of the earth

subtitles.original: ぶっ飛ばして心中しよう さぁ手を伸ばして!
subtitles.english: Let's drive madly and perish together! Throw up your arms!

subtitles.original: 地平線に届くように
subtitles.english: To reach the horizon

subtitles.original: 限界まで振り切ってくれ
subtitles.english: You've got to break down the barrier to the limit

subtitles.original: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning
subtitles.english: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning

subtitles.original: Flash! I'm in the coolest driver's high
subtitles.english: Flash! I'm in the coolest driver's high

subtitles.original: 最高のフィナーレを! Yeah!
subtitles.english: This is the best finale ever! Yeah!

subtitles.original: もう数えるくらいで僕らは消え失せて
subtitles.english: Soon enough we'll be no more

subtitles.original: 真っ暗な朝が来るね
subtitles.english: and a pitch black morning will come for us

subtitles.original: お気に入りの服に さぁ着替えたなら
subtitles.english: So get in your favorite clothes

subtitles.original: 駆け出して!
subtitles.english: and we'll take off!

subtitles.original: あきれるほど声を上げて
subtitles.english: Raise your voice as high as you can

subtitles.original: 大気圏を突破しようぜ
subtitles.english: and we'll slip through the atmosphere!

subtitles.original: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning
subtitles.english: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning

subtitles.original: Flash! I'm in the coolest driver's high
subtitles.english: Flash! I'm in the coolest driver's high

subtitles.original: 鋼の翼で
subtitles.english: With steel wings

subtitles.original: 駆けぬけてよ時間切れまで
subtitles.english: Until my time's up let's keep breaking through,

subtitles.original: 生まれつきのスピード狂なのさ
subtitles.english: 'cuz I was born speed crazy!

subtitles.original: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning
subtitles.english: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning

subtitles.original: Flash! I'm in the coolest driver's high
subtitles.english: Flash! I'm in the coolest driver's high

subtitles.original: 来世でまた会おう Yeah!
subtitles.english: See ya in the next world, yeah!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitling the Virtual Performance Video**

Okay, here's the breakdown. The task is to subtitle this video segment, and since I'm the expert, I'm going to make sure this is done precisely. First, I noticed the initial static image with text: "輪堂千速生誕祭2026 Flatout Summites," "重大告知あり," and "2026 7.8 [Wed] 20:00 START." The instructions say to subtitle prominent on-screen text, so from 00:00 to 00:53, I'm noting this:

*   00:00.000 - 00:53.000: Chihaya Rindo Birthday Festival 2026 Flatout Summites / Major announcement included / 2026 7.8 [Wed] 20:00 START

Around 00:54 the video jumps to a car starting. From 01:06 onwards, the virtual performer, Chihaya Rindo, begins to speak. The instructions state dialogue should be transcribed and translated. I've transcribed and timed the spoken dialogue precisely:

*   01:06.500 - 01:11.800: Everyone, thank you for coming to Chihaya Birthday Festival 2026!
*   01:11.800 - 01:14.000: Are you ready to get hyped?
*   01:14.000 - 01:19.500: Let's pump it up!
*   01:20.200 - 01:23.200: But I have to rush to take everyone to the live venue right now,
*   01:23.200 - 01:25.500: so will you come with me?
*   01:25.500 - 01:27.500: Let's go!

At 01:28, the song "Driver's High" by L'Arc-en-Ciel starts. I've listened carefully to the audio and transcribed and translated the lyrics, paying close attention to the timing of each phrase.

*   01:28.500 - 01:33.200: This metallic heart of silver grew hotter
*   01:33.800 - 01:39.200: I'll light the fuse for you
*   01:39.500 - 01:44.500: This is such a wondrous high
*   01:44.800 - 01:50.000: Let's go kick up some dust
*   01:50.200 - 01:55.600: A wild pulse coupled with the shouts
*   01:55.800 - 02:01.000: Before my eyes a rain of missiles

(Instrumental break, no lyrics)

*   02:12.400 - 02:17.500: Adrenaline always pumping
*   02:17.800 - 02:22.900: It'll be me that overheats!
*   02:23.200 - 02:28.100: Even if I explode and turn into ash
*   02:28.400 - 02:34.000: I bet I'll be laughing as I am now
*   02:34.200 - 02:39.200: Throughout the city to the ends of the earth
*   02:39.400 - 02:45.000: Let's drive madly and perish together! Throw up your arms!
*   02:45.300 - 02:50.400: To reach the horizon
*   02:50.700 - 02:56.800: You've got to break down the barrier to the limit
*   02:57.100 - 03:00.300: Woh! Clash! Into the rolling morning
*   03:00.300 - 03:0

From 00:00 to 00:54, it's just the title card: "輪堂千速生誕祭2026 Flat Out Summerites" and "重大告知あり", then "2026 7.8 [wed] 20:00 START".

Okay, now for the audio. At 00:55, a car engine starts. Then, the spoken part starts at 01:06, with "Rindo Chihaya's Birthday Festival 2026! Thank you for coming to Flat Out Summerites!". Time to transcribe it accurately, and with precise timestamps.
